/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -shared -Wl,-soname,libavif.so -o libavif.so CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/alpha.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/avif.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/colr.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/diag.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/exif.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/io.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/mem.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/obu.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/rawdata.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/read.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/reformat.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/reformat_libsharpyuv.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/reformat_libyuv.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/scale.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/stream.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/write.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/third_party/libyuv/source/scale.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/third_party/libyuv/source/scale_common.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/third_party/libyuv/source/scale_any.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/third_party/libyuv/source/row_common.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/third_party/libyuv/source/planar_functions.c.o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/codec_dav1d.c.o  ../dav1d/libdav1d.so -lm -ldl -pthread -latomic -lm
